_doc: Owner-curated MONTHLY bulletin shown to clinics on their dashboard. INFORMATIONAL only — never changes protocols or decisions. Dr. Falcon edits this once a month (or leave 'active': false to hide it).
title: FDA peptide compounding meeting — July 23–24, 2026
body: The FDA Pharmacy Compounding Advisory Committee meets July 23–24 to evaluate BPC-157, KPV, TB-500, MOTS-c, DSIP, Semax and Epitalon for the §503A compounding list. The outcome may affect which compounded peptides remain available. This is informational awareness — it does not change any of your protocols or decisions.
